namespace batch_insert_products {

bool batch_insert_products(const std::vector<Product>& products) {
    try {
        // Connect to the database

            "product_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, "
            "name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, "
            "price REAL NOT NULL, "
            "category VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, "
            "stock INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0);";

        data.reserve(products.size());
        for (const auto& product : products) {
            data.emplace_back(product.name, product.price, product.category, product.stock);
        }

        // Begin transaction
        conn->begin_transaction();

        // Insert data
        const std::string insert_sql =
            "INSERT INTO Product (name, price, category, stock) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)";
        const auto res = conn->insert(insert_sql, data.begin(), data.end());

        // Commit

}

<answer>```cpp
#include <ranges>
#include <rfl.hpp>
#include <rfl/json.hpp>
#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <vector>

namespace batch_insert_products {

struct Product {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> product_id;
  std::string name;
  float price;
  std::string category;
  int stock;
};

bool batch_insert_products(const std::vector<Product>& _products) {
  try {
    // Connect to the SQLite database
    auto conn = sqlgen::connect<sqlgen::sqlite::Connection>("test_db.sqlite");

    // Drop existing Product table if it exists
    conn->execute("DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Product;");

    // Create Product table
    const std::string create_table_sql =
        "CREATE TABLE Product ("
        "product_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, "
        "name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, "
        "price REAL NOT NULL, "
        "category VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, "
        "stock INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0);";
    conn->execute(create_table_sql);

    // Prepare data for batch insertion (exclude auto-incrementing product_id)
    std::vector<std::tuple<std::string, float, std::string, int>> data;
    data.reserve(_products.size());
    for (const auto& product : _products) {
      data.emplace_back(product.name, product.price, product.category, product.stock);
    }

    // Begin transaction
    conn->begin_transaction();

    // Insert data in a batch
    const std::string insert_sql =
        "INSERT INTO Product (name, price, category, stock) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)";
    const auto insert_result = conn->insert(insert_sql, data.begin(), data.end());

    if (!insert_result) {
      conn->rollback();
      return false;
    }

    // Commit transaction
    conn->commit();
    return true;
  } catch (const std::exception& e) {
    // Handle any exceptions (e.g., log the error)
    return false;
  }
}
}  // namespace batch_insert_products
```</answer>

  void create_eas_database() {
    const auto data_dir = std::filesystem::path("data");

    const auto eas_db_path = std::string("data/eas_database.db");

    auto conn = sqlgen::sqlite::Connection::make(main_db_path).value();

    const auto attach_sql = "ATTACH DATABASE '" + eas_db_path + "' AS EAS_DB;";
    conn->execute(attach_sql);
  }
}

<answer>
```cpp
#include <optional>
#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <vector>
#include <chrono>
#include <iomanip>
#include <sstream>

namespace query_active_users_posts {

struct User {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> user_id;
  std::string username;
};

struct Post {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> post_id;
  int user_id;
  sqlgen::DateTime created_at;
};

struct ActiveUser {
  static constexpr const char* tablename = "ActiveUserView";
  static constexpr bool is_view = true;
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> user_id;
  std::string username;
};

std::vector<ActiveUser> query_active_users_posts() {
  auto conn = sqlgen::make_sqlite_conn("test_db.sqlite");

  // Create tables
  conn->execute(sqlgen::to_sql(sqlgen::make_create_table<User>()));
  conn->execute(sqlgen::to_sql(sqlgen::make_create_table<Post>()));

  // Define date range
  sqlgen::DateTime start_date("2025-12-01");
  sqlgen::DateTime end_date("2025-12-31");

  // Build and execute the query
  auto query = conn->select_from<User>()
      .join<Post, sqlgen::JoinType::inner>(
          [](const auto& u, const auto& p) { return u.user_id == p.user_id; })
      .where([](const auto& p) { return p.created_at >= start_date && p.created_at <= end_date; })
      .select("u.user_id", "u.username")
      .distinct()
      .transform([](auto&& res) -> std::vector<ActiveUser> {
        std::vector<ActiveUser> active_users;
        for (auto& row : res) {
          ActiveUser au;
          au.user_id = row.get<int>("user_id");
          au.username = row.get<std::string>("username");
          active_users.emplace_back(std::move(au));
        }
        return active_users;
      });

  return query.value();
}

}  // namespace query_active_users_posts
</answer>

#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <vector>
#include <chrono>
#include <iomanip>
#include <sstream>

namespace query_active_users_posts {

struct User {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> user_id;
  std::string username;
};

struct Post {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> post_id;
  int user_id;
  sqlgen::DateTime created_at;
};

struct ActiveUser {
  static constexpr const char* tablename = "ActiveUserView";
  static constexpr bool is_view = true;
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> user_id;
  std::string username;
};

std::vector<ActiveUser> query_active_users_posts() {
  auto conn = sqlgen::make_sqlite_conn("test_db.sqlite");

  // Create tables
  conn->execute(sqlgen::to_sql(sqlgen::make_create_table<User>()));
  conn->execute(sqlgen::to_sql(sqlgen::make_create_table<Post>()));

  // Define date range
  sqlgen::DateTime start_date("2025-12-01");
  sqlgen::DateTime end_date("2025-12-31");

  // Build and execute the query
  auto query = conn->select_from<User>()
      .join<Post, sqlgen::JoinType::inner>(
          [](const auto& u, const auto& p) { return u.user_id == p.user_id; })
      .where([](const auto& p) { return p.created_at >= start_date && p.created_at <= end_date; })
      .select("u.user_id", "u.username")
      .distinct()
      .transform([](auto&& res) -> std::vector<ActiveUser> {
        std::vector<ActiveUser> active_users;
        for (auto& row : res) {
          ActiveUser au;
          au.user_id = row.get<int>("user_id");
          au.username = row.get<std::string>("username");
          active_users.emplace_back(std::move(au));
        }
        return active_users;
      });

  return query.value();
}

}  // namespace query_active_users_posts
</answer>

#include <optional>

#include "query_course_enrollment_stats.hpp"

namespace query_course_enrollment_stats {

struct Course {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> course_id;
  std::string title;
};

struct Enrollment {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> enrollment_id;
  sqlgen::ForeignKey<int, Course, "course_id"> course_id;
  std::optional<float> grade;
};

struct CourseStats {
  std::string title;
  int student_count;
  std::optional<double> avg_grade;
};

/**
 * Function: Calculate enrollment statistics per course.
 * 
 * @return List of course statistics
 */
std::vector<CourseStats> query_course_enrollment_stats() {
  auto conn = sqlgen::sqlite::connect("test_db.sqlite");
  auto session = conn->session();

  // Create tables
  session.create_as_table<Course>();
  session.create_as_table<Enrollment>();

  // Execute the query
  struct QueryResult {
    std::string title;
    int student_count;
    std::optional<double> avg_grade;
  };

  auto res = session.template read<QueryResult>(
      "SELECT c.title, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) as student_count, AVG(e.grade) as avg_grade "

#include <optional>

struct Employee {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> emp_id;

  std::string employee;
  std::optional<std::string> manager;

std::vector<EmployeeManager> query_employee_hierarchy() {
  auto conn = sqlgen::make_SQLiteConnection("test_db.sqlite");

std::vector<CategoryReport> query_product_sales_report() {

#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <vector>
#include <string>

namespace query_product_sales_report {

struct Product {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> product_id;
  std::string category;
};

struct Sale {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> sale_id;
  int product_id;
  int quantity;
  double amount;
};

struct CategoryReport {
  std::string category;
  int total_qty;
  double total_amt;
};

std::vector<CategoryReport> query_product_sales_report() {
    try {
        auto conn = sqlgen::sqlite::Connection("test_db.sqlite");
        auto query = R"(
            SELECT p.category, SUM(s.quantity) AS total_qty, SUM(s.amount) AS total_amt
            FROM Product p
            INNER JOIN Sale s ON p.product_id = s.product_id
            GROUP BY p.category
            HAVING total_amt > 5000;
        )";
        auto res = conn->execute(query);

        std::vector<CategoryReport> reports;
        for (const auto& row : res) {

            cr.total_qty = row.get<int>("total_qty");
            cr.total_amt = row.get<double>("total_amt");

        }
        return reports;
    } catch (const std::exception& e) {

}

}  // namespace query_product_sales_report

<answer>```cpp
#include <optional>
#include <rfl.hpp>
#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <string>
#include <vector>

#include "query_search_books_by_criteria.hpp"

namespace query_search_books_by_criteria {

std::vector<Book> query_search_books_by_criteria(const BookFilters& _filters) {
  auto db = sqlgen::connect<sqlgen::SQLite>("test_db.sqlite");
  auto query = sqlgen::select_from<Book>(db);

  std::vector<sqlgen::Condition> conditions;

  if (_filters.title_keyword) {
    auto title_condition = sqlgen::make_condition(
        sqlgen::col<Book>::title.like("%" + *_filters.title_keyword + "%"));
    conditions.push_back(title_condition);
  }

  if (_filters.min_year) {
    auto min_year_condition = sqlgen::make_condition(
        sqlgen::col<Book>::year >= *_filters.min_year);
    conditions.push_back(min_year_condition);
  }

  if (_filters.genre) {
    auto genre_condition = sqlgen::make_condition(
        sqlgen::col<Book>::genre == *_filters.genre);
    conditions.push_back(genre_condition);
  }

  if (_filters.max_price) {
    auto max_price_condition = sqlgen::make_condition(
        sqlgen::col<Book>::price <= *_filters.max_price);
    conditions.push_back(max_price_condition);
  }

  if (!conditions.empty()) {
    auto combined_condition = sqlgen::make_condition(
        rfl::apply(
            [](const auto&... _cond) { return sqlgen::conditions::and_(_cond...); },
            conditions));
    query.where(combined_condition);
  }

  return query.transform([](auto&& _range) {
    return rfl::from_range(std::move(_range))
        .transform([](auto&& _vec) {
          return std::vector<Book>(std::make_move_iterator(_vec.begin()),
                                    std::make_move_iterator(_vec.end()));
        });
  }).value_or(std::vector<Book>());
}
}  // namespace query_search_books_by_criteria
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <rfl.hpp>
#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>

namespace schema_create_complex_table {

struct UserProfile {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int, sqlgen::auto_incr> user_id;
  sqlgen::Unique<std::string> username;
  sqlgen::Unique<std::string> email;
  int age;
  std::string bio;
  sqlgen::DateTime created_at;
  bool is_verified;
};

bool create_complex_table() {
  try {
    auto session = sqlgen::sqlite::Session("test_db.sqlite");
    session.create_table<UserProfile>();
    return true;
  } catch (const std::exception& e) {
    return false;
  }
}
}  // namespace schema_create_complex_table
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <rfl.hpp>
#include <rfl/json.hpp>
#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <string>
#include <vector>

namespace schema_manage_indexes {

struct Product {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> product_id;
  std::string sku;
  std::string name;
  std::string category;
  double price;
};

bool manage_indexes() {
  try {
    auto conn = sqlgen::connect<sqlite>("test_db.sqlite");
    
    // Check if Product table exists
    const std::string check_table_sql =
        "SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name='Product';";
    auto cursor = conn->execute(check_table_sql);
    bool table_exists = false;
    while (cursor->next()) {
      table_exists = true;
      break;
    }
    if (!table_exists) {
      // Create the Product table
      conn->create_table<Product>();
    }
    
    // Create indexes with IF NOT EXISTS
    conn->execute("CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_product_category ON Product(category);");
    conn->execute("CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_product_sku ON Product(sku);");
    conn->execute("CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_product_name_price ON Product(name, price);");
    
    return true;
  } catch (const std::exception& e) {
    // Log the error or handle it as needed
    return false;
  }
}

}  // namespace schema_manage_indexes
```</answer>

  conn.execute("ALTER TABLE Score ADD COLUMN Grade CHAR(1) NOT NULL;");

  // Step 2: Modify Age in Student
  conn.execute("ALTER TABLE Student MODIFY Age INT NULL;");

  // Step 3: Drop Major table
  conn.drop_table<Major>();
}

// update_eas_table.hpp
#pragma once

#include <filesystem>
#include <rfl.hpp>
#include <rfl/json.hpp>
#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <string>

namespace update_eas_table {

void update_eas_table() {
  const auto db_path = "data/eas_database.db";

  // Connect to the existing database
  auto conn = sqlgen::sqlite::connect(db_path).value();

  // 1. Add Grade column to Score table
  conn.execute("ALTER TABLE Score ADD COLUMN Grade CHAR(1) NOT NULL;");

  // 2. Modify Age column in Student table (assuming it exists)
  conn.execute("ALTER TABLE Student MODIFY Age INT NULL;");

  // 3. Drop Major table
  conn.drop_table<Major>();
}

} // namespace update_eas_table

```cpp
#include <ranges>
#include <rfl.hpp>
#include <rfl/json.hpp>
#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <vector>

namespace schema_create_view_sales_summary {

struct Product {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> product_id;
  std::string name;
  double price;
  int stock;
};

struct Sale {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int, sqlgen::auto_incr> sale_id;
  int product_id;
  int quantity;
  double amount;
};

struct SalesSummary {
  static constexpr bool is_view = true;
  std::string product_name;
  int total_quantity;
  double total_revenue;
};

bool create_view_sales_summary() {
  try {
    auto conn = sqlgen::sqlite::connect("test_db.sqlite");
    
    // Check if the view exists
    const std::string check_sql = "SELECT count(*) FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='view' AND name='SalesSummary';";
    auto check_res = conn->execute(check_sql);
    if (!check_res) {
      return false;
    }
    
    int count = check_res->begin()->at(0).as<int>();
    if (count > 0) {
      // Drop the existing view
      const std::string drop_sql = "DROP VIEW SalesSummary;";
      auto drop_res = conn->execute(drop_sql);
      if (!drop_res) {
        return false;
      }
    }
    
    // Create the new view
    const std::string create_view_sql =
        "CREATE VIEW SalesSummary AS "
        "SELECT p.name as product_name, SUM(s.quantity) as total_quantity, SUM(s.amount) as total_revenue "
        "FROM Sale s "
        "JOIN Product p ON s.product_id = p.product_id "
        "GROUP BY p.name;";
    auto create_res = conn->execute(create_view_sql);
    return create_res;
  } catch (const std::exception& e) {
    return false;
  }
}

}  // namespace schema_create_view_sales_summary

<answer>```cpp
#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <vector>
#include <optional>

namespace right_join_departments_projects {

struct Department {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> department_id;
  std::string name;
};

struct Project {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> project_id;
  int department_id;
  std::string name;
};

struct DepProj {
  std::optional<std::string> department_name;
  std::string project_name;
};

std::vector<DepProj> right_join_departments_projects() {
  auto conn = sqlgen::sqlite::connect("test_db.sqlite");

  const auto query = conn->prepare(
      "SELECT Department.name, COALESCE(Project.name, '') AS project_name "
      "FROM Project "
      "RIGHT JOIN Department ON Project.department_id = Department.department_id"
  );

  return query->read<DepProj>();
}
}  // namespace right_join_departments_projects
```</answer>

#include <rfl.hpp>
#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>

#include "limit_recent_events.hpp"

namespace limit_recent_events {

std::vector<OrderMetrics> calculate_order_metrics_impl(const std::vector<OrderItem>& items) {

      product_id,
      unit_price,
      quantity,
      discount_rate,

      (quantity % 10) as quantity_group,

    om.quantity_group = row[11];
    om.estimated_profit = row[12];

}

namespace read_single_record_by_id {

struct Customer {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> customer_id;
  std::string name;
  std::string email;
};

<answer>```cpp
#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <vector>

namespace join_orders_customers_payments {

struct Customer {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> customer_id;
  std::string name;
};

struct Order {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> order_id;
  int customer_id;
  sqlgen::Timestamp<"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"> order_date;
};

struct Payment {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> payment_id;
  int order_id;
  double amount;
};

struct Consolidated {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> order_id;
  std::string customer_name;
  double amount;
};

std::vector<Consolidated> join_orders_customers_payments() {
  auto conn = sqlgen::sqlite::Connection::make("test_db.sqlite").value();
  auto session = sqlgen::Session{.conn = std::move(conn)};

  const auto query = session.select_from<Order>()
      .join<Customer, Order::customer_id == Customer::customer_id>()
      .join<Payment, Order::order_id == Payment::order_id>()
      .fields(Order::order_id, Customer::name, Payment::amount)
      .order_by(Payment::amount.desc())
      .to<Consolidated>();

  return query;
}
}  // namespace join_orders_customers_payments
```</answer>

std::vector<UpdatedNote> replace_text_in_notes() {

#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <vector>

namespace inventory_bulk_write_and_read {

struct Inventory {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> item_id;
  std::string name;
  int quantity;
  std::string location;
};

bool inventory_bulk_write_and_read(const std::vector<Inventory>& items) {
  try {
    auto conn = sqlgen::SQLite::make_conn("test_db.sqlite");
    conn.insert(items.begin(), items.end());

    std::vector<Inventory> filtered_items;
    auto res = conn.execute("SELECT item_id, name, quantity, location FROM Inventory WHERE quantity > 50 ORDER BY quantity DESC;");
    res.read_to(filtered_items);

    return !filtered_items.empty();
  } catch (const std::exception& e) {
    return false;
  }
}
}  // namespace inventory_bulk_write_and_read
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <vector>

namespace cascade_delete_demo {

struct Parent {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> parent_id;
  std::string name;
};

struct Child {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> child_id;
  sqlgen::ForeignKey<int, Parent, "parent_id"> parent_id;
  std::string note;
};

bool cascade_delete_demo() {
  try {
    auto conn = sqlgen::SQLiteConn("test_db.sqlite");
    conn.execute("PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON;");
    conn.create_table<Parent>();
    conn.create_table<Child>());

    // Insert parent record
    Parent parent{.parent_id = 1, .name = "Parent1"};
    conn.insert(parent);

    // Insert child record linked to parent
    Child child{.child_id = 1, .parent_id = 1, .note = "Test note"};
    conn.insert(child);

    // Delete parent and check if child is cascaded
    conn.execute("DELETE FROM Parent WHERE parent_id = 1;");
    
    // Verify child deletion
    const auto children = conn.select_from<Child>(sqlgen::where("parent_id = 1"));
    return children.empty();
  } catch (...) {
    return false;
  }
}
}  // namespace cascade_delete_demo
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <rfl.hpp>
#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <vector>

#include "select_from_read_to_vector.hpp"

namespace select_from_read_to_vector {

struct Book {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> book_id;
  std::string title;
  int pages;
};

std::vector<Book> select_from_read_to_vector() {
  const auto db_file = "books.db";
  using ConnType = sqlgen::sqlite::Connection;
  auto conn = ConnType::make(db_file).value();

  const auto query =
      "SELECT book_id, title, pages FROM Book ORDER BY pages DESC;";
  return conn->template select_from<Book>(query).transform(
      [](auto&& _vec) { return std::move(_vec); })
      .value();
}

}  // namespace select_from_read_to_vector
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <string>
#include <optional>
#include <vector>

namespace coalesce_function {

struct Profile {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> id;
  std::optional<std::string> nickname;
};

struct NicknameResult {
  std::string display_name;
};

inline auto coalesce_function() {
  auto query = sqlgen::select_from<Profile>(
      sqlgen::functions::coalesce(sqlgen::col<Profile>().nickname, "Anonymous")
          .as("display_name"))
      .transform([](auto range) {
        std::vector<NicknameResult> results;
        for (auto& res : range) {
          results.emplace_back(NicknameResult{.display_name = std::move(res.display_name)}};
        }
        return results;
      });

  return query.value_or(std::vector<NicknameResult>());
}

}  // namespace coalesce_function
```</answer>

std::vector<TopProduct> get_top_products(size_t limit_count) {
  // Create connection
  auto conn = sqlgen::make_conn<sqlgen::SQLite>("test_db.sqlite");

  // Build the SQL query
  std::stringstream stream;
  stream << "SELECT p.product_id, p.product_name, p.category, SUM(p.price * s.quantity) AS total_sales "
       << "FROM Product p INNER JOIN Sales s ON p.product_id = s.product_id "
       << "GROUP BY p.product_id, p.product_name, p.category "
       << "ORDER BY total_sales DESC "
       << "LIMIT " << limit_count;

  std::string query = stream.str();

  // Execute the query and read into TopProduct vector
  std::vector<TopProduct> results;
  conn->template read<TopProduct>(query, results);

  return results;
}

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <ranges>
#include <rfl.hpp>
#include <sstream>
#include <stdexcept>
#include <string>
#include <type_traits>
#include <utility>
#include <vector>

#include "sqlgen/internal/collect/vector.hpp"
#include "sqlgen/internal/strings/strings.hpp"

namespace get_top_products {

std::vector<TopProduct> get_top_products(size_t limit_count) {
  const auto query = R"(
    SELECT p.product_id, p.product_name, p.category, SUM(p.price * s.quantity) AS total_sales
    FROM Product p
    INNER JOIN Sales s ON p.product_id = s.product_id
    GROUP BY p.product_id, p.product_name, p.category
    ORDER BY total_sales DESC
    LIMIT ?
  )";

  try {
    auto conn = sqlgen::make_conn<sqlgen::SQLite>("test_db.sqlite");
    const auto res = conn->execute(query, sqlgen::values(limit_count));
    return sqlgen::internal::collect::vector(
        res | transform([](auto&& _row) -> TopProduct {
          return TopProduct{
              .product_id = _row.get<int>(0),
              .product_name = _row.get<std::string>(1),
              .category = _row.get<std::string>(2),
              .total_sales = _row.get<double>(3)};
        }));
  } catch (std::exception& e) {
    throw std::runtime_error("Failed to retrieve top products: " + std::string(e.what()));
  }
}

}  // namespace get_top_products
```</answer>

<answer>
```cpp
#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <unordered_map>

namespace update_inventory_stock {

struct Product {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> product_id;
  int stock;
};

bool update_inventory_stock(const std::unordered_map<int, int>& received) {
  using namespace sqlgen;
  using namespace sqlgen::literals;
  auto conn_res = sqlite::connect("test_db.sqlite");
  if (!conn_res) return false;

  auto txn_res = begin_transaction(conn_res.value());
  if (!txn_res) return false;
  auto txn = txn_res.value();

  auto update_stmt = txn->prepare_statement(
      "UPDATE Product SET stock = stock + ? WHERE product_id = ?"
  );

  for (const auto& [pid, qty] : received) {
    auto res = update_stmt->execute(qty, pid);
    if (!res) {
      return false;
    }
  }

  auto commit_res = commit(txn);
  return commit_res.has_value();
}

}  // namespace update_inventory_stock
```
</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <vector>
#include <rfl.hpp>

namespace create_view_order_summary {

struct Order {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> order_id;
  std::string customer;
};

struct OrderItem {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> item_id;
  int order_id;
  double unit_price;
  int quantity;
};

struct OrderSummary {
  static constexpr const char* tablename = "OrderSummaryView";
  static constexpr bool is_view = true;
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> order_id;
  std::string customer;
  double total;
};

std::vector<OrderSummary> create_view_order_summary() {
  auto conn = sqlgen::sqlite::connect("test_db.sqlite");

  // Create the view using the query builder
  const auto query = sqlgen::select_from<Order, rfl::internal::StringLiteral<"o">()>(
             .join<OrderItem, rfl::internal::StringLiteral<"oi">().on([](const auto& _o, const auto& _oi) {
               return _o.order_id == _oi.order_id;
             })
             .fields("o.order_id", "o.customer", (sqlgen::col("oi.unit_price") * sqlgen::col("oi.quantity")).sum().as("total"))
             .where(nullptr)  // No WHERE clause for INNER JOIN
             .group_by("o.order_id", "o.customer")
             .to_sql());

  conn->execute("CREATE VIEW OrderSummaryView AS " + query);

  // Read from the view
  const auto result = conn->template select_from<OrderSummary>().transform(
      [](auto range) {
        std::vector<OrderSummary> summaries;
        for (auto& res : range) {
          summaries.emplace_back(std::move(*res));
        }
        return summaries;
      });

  return result.value_or(std::vector<OrderSummary>());
}
}  // namespace create_view_order_summary
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <string>

namespace drop_table_if_exists {

struct Log {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> id;
  std::string message;
};

/**
 * This function demonstrates dropping a table if it exists.
 * Returns: std::string.
 */
inline std::string drop_table_if_exists() {
  auto table = sqlgen::Table<Log>{};
  auto query = table.drop(sqlgen::dynamic::Drop::What::table, true, false);
  return query.str();
}
}  // namespace drop_table_if_exists
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <ranges>
#include <rfl.hpp>
#include <sstream>
#include <stdexcept>
#include <string>
#include <vector>

#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>

#include "weekday_sales_analysis.hpp"

namespace weekday_sales_analysis {

std::vector<WeekdayStats> weekday_sales_analysis() {
  try {
    auto conn = sqlgen::sqlite::Connection::make("test_db.sqlite").value();

    const auto sales = sqlgen::from<Sales>();

    const auto query = sales
        .fields(sqlgen::functions::strftime("%w", sales.sale_time).as("weekday"),
                  sqlgen::functions::sum(sales.quantity))
        .where(sqlgen::nothing)
        .group_by("weekday")
        .to<std::vector<std::pair<std::string, int>>>(conn);

    std::vector<WeekdayStats> result;
    for (const auto& [weekday_str, total] : query) {
      WeekdayStats stats;
      stats.weekday = std::stoi(weekday_str);
      stats.total_quantity = total;
      result.push_back(stats);
    }
    return result;
  } catch (std::exception& e) {
    // Handle exceptions (e.g., log the error, rethrow, etc.)
    throw std::runtime_error("Database operation failed: " + std::string(e.what()));
  }
}

}  // namespace weekday_sales_analysis
```</answer>

#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <vector>

namespace project_time_tracking {

// ... structs ...

std::vector<TimeMetrics> project_time_tracking() {
  auto conn = sqlgen::SQLiteConn::make("test_db.sqlite").value();

  const auto query = R"(
    SELECT 
      p.project_id, 
      p.name,
      strftime('%d', MIN(t.start_time)) as day,
      strftime('%m', MIN(t.start_time)) as month,
      strftime('%Y', MIN(t.start_time)) as year,
      strftime('%H', MIN(t.start_time)) as hour,
      strftime('%M', MIN(t.start_time)) as minute,
      strftime('%S', MIN(t.start_time)) as second,
      SUM(julianday(t.end_time) - julianday(t.start_time)) as duration_days
    FROM Project p
    INNER JOIN TimeLog t ON p.project_id = t.project_id
    GROUP BY p.project_id, strftime('%Y-%W', MIN(t.start_time))
  )";

  const auto res = conn->execute(query);

  std::vector<TimeMetrics> metrics;
  for (const auto& row : res) {
    TimeMetrics tm;
    tm.project_id = row.get<int>("project_id");
    tm.name = row.get<std::string>("name");
    tm.day = row.get<int>("day");
    tm.month = row.get<int>("month");
    tm.year = row.get<int>("year");
    tm.hour = row.get<int>("hour");
    tm.minute = row.get<int>("minute");
    tm.second = row.get<int>("second");
    tm.duration_days = row.get<double>("duration_days");
    metrics.push_back(std::move(tm));
  }

  return metrics;
}

}  // namespace project_time_tracking

#endif
